Agent.Name: UnraidDeck

Variable.Help: Enter your App Token from the Unraid Deck iOS App Settings.
Specify the fields which are included in the title.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############
# Ensure token is provided if [ -z "$DECK_TOKEN" ]; then logger -t "UnraidDeck" "Error: DECK_TOKEN is not set. Configure it in Notification Settings." exit 1 fi
# API Endpoint PUSHURL="https://unraid-push.mccray.app/webhook/$DECK_TOKEN" # Ensure variables have safe defaults IMPORTANCE="${IMPORTANCE:-normal}"
# Sanitize values for safe JSON string embedding json_escape() { local s="${1//\"/\\\"}" printf '%s' "$s" }
ESC_TITLE=$(json_escape "$DECK_TITLE") ESC_MESSAGE=$(json_escape "$DECK_MESSAGE") ESC_TIMESTAMP=$(json_escape "$TIMESTAMP") ESC_LINK=$(json_escape "$LINK")
JSON_PAYLOAD=$(printf '{"title":"%s","message":"%s","importance":"%s","timestamp":"%s","link":"%s"}' \ "$ESC_TITLE" "$ESC_MESSAGE" "$IMPORTANCE" "$ESC_TIMESTAMP" "$ESC_LINK")
# Send push notification with 10s timeout, piping output to /dev/null curl -s -m 10 -X POST "$PUSHURL" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" \ -d "$JSON_PAYLOAD" > /dev/null 2>&1
